name: mathread
description: Local provenance-first PDF capture service and browser extension

scripts.test: bun run build && bun test tests/annotations.test.ts tests/extension-shim.test.ts && bun test --max-concurrency=1 tests/arxiv-features.test.ts && bun test --max-concurrency=1 tests/extension-boundary.test.ts && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov tests/annotations.test.ts tests/extension-shim.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info lcov.info
scripts.build: rm -rf dist/extension && bun build ./extension/mathread/background.ts ./extension/mathread/link-origin.ts ./extension/mathread/reader-swap.ts ./extension/mathread/options.ts --outdir dist/extension/mathread --target browser && bun build ./extension/reader/backend.ts --outdir dist/extension/reader/vendor --target browser && bun build ./extension/reader/annotations.ts --outdir dist/extension/reader --target browser && bun run extension/build.ts
scripts.dev: bun run build && bun build --watch ./extension/mathread/background.ts ./extension/mathread/link-origin.ts ./extension/mathread/reader-swap.ts --outdir dist/extension/mathread --target browser
scripts.package: bun run build && bun run extension/package.ts
